titleStmt.title: SII 27.156: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 156. (A.R. No. 598 of 1929-30.) HANDĀḌI, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in the prākāra of Heggaḍe Gōpālakṛishṇa temple.
This is dated Śaka 1414, Paridhāvi, Vaiśākha śu. 15, Friday corresponding to 1492 A.D., May 11, Friday, f.d.t. ·16. The month was Nija-Vaiśākha.

It registers a gift of 200 gadyānas of gold for the expenses of śrībali service in the temple of Gōpīnātha by Honnakaḷasarāya, son of Triyambakarāya while he was governing Bārakūru-rājya. The temple was caused to be built by Saṁku-heggaḍe, nephew (aḷiya) of Hosabaṇṇa-seṭṭi, in Haṁdāḍi, an adhivāsa of the village Brahmūru (c.f. Further sources: Vol I, p. 149, Appendix).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatayēṁ namaḥ . śrī sarasvatsai namaḥ . śrī gurubhyōṁ namaḥ . nirvighnama
stu . namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē . trayilōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .
svastiśrī jayādbhudaya śālivāhanaśakavarṣa 1414 saṁdu vartamāna pari
dhāvi saṁvatsarada vayiśākha śu 15 śulū śrī manmahā maṁḍaḷēśvara mēdini mī
saragaṁḍa kaṭhārisāḷuva narasihvarāyara mahārāyara kumāra yiṁmaḍi narasihva
rāyamahārāyaru vijenagariya siṁhvāsanadalū sakalasāṁbrājyavanā
ḷuva kāladali śrī manmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī vīrapratā triyaṁbaka
rāyarakumāraru hoṁnakaḷasarāya mahārāyaru bārakūra rājyava nā
ḷuva kāladalū braṁhmara grāmadavoḷage mūḍabhāgadalli haṁdāḍiya Adhivā
sadoḷage kōṭikēriya mābuseṭiya baḷiya hosabaṇṇa seṭiyara Aḷiya saṁ
kuhegaḍe pratiṣṭeya māḍisida śrīgōpinātha dēvara dinacariya naḍava śrī baliya
dharmmakke nāu dēvara pratiṣṭheyāda puṁṇyatithiyalū sahiraṁṇyōdaka dānadhārā
pūrvakavāgi Ācaṁdrārkkastāyiyāgi dinacari śrībalinaḍavahāge dhāreya
neṟadu koṭṭa ga 200 kke vivara haṁdāḍiya Adhivāsadiṁda beṁṇekāduriṁda
saṁkuheggeḍe baddabāḷu teṟukāṭi ga 80 rāma Uṁgura paḷiya jaṁnada bageyiṁ
da Aramanege teṟuva teṟu mu 48 . ge kāṭi ga 48 . madapāḍi AreŪra bhāgisa
saṁkuheggeḍe badabāḷu teṟu kāṭi ga 20 madhyasta hoḷana Apaṇeyalū haṁdāḍiya
Ūra hādimodala Āppaṇeyalū Aṁṇa Uṁgura paḷli Aṇpeyiṁda Abbubē
hādi bageya hoṁnu saha Ā manege teṟu Uḍu nānā bageŪ kāṭi ga 26 . Āṁ
ttū nānā bageyiṁda haṁdāḍiya Adhivāsadiṁda Aramanege teṟuva kāṭiga 175 ma
ttaṁ paḍuva bhāgiya voḷage grāmaṇi viṣṇuvoraṁbaḷiyiṁda taṁne hadi moda
liṁda Aramanege teṟuva siddhāyada hoṁnina voḷage śrī gōpinātha dēvarige dhāre
yaneṟadu kāṭi ga 25 Ubhayaṁ nānābageŪ kāṭi ga 240 Akṣaradalū kāṭi
gadyāṇa yiṁnūṟu hoṁnanū śrī gōpinātha dēvara dinacari naḍava śrībalidharmakke
hoṁnakaḷasarāyarū sahiraṁṇyōdaka dānadhārāpūrvaka Ācaṁdrārkkastāyi
dānasāleya naṁjappana bageŪ Ū ṟu Appaṇeyalū
kāṭi ga 1 sahavāgi dhāreneṟeduko rasi naḍisida dharma śilāśāsa
yiṁtappudakke hoṁnakaḷasa rāyara suhastada voppa karaṇika sāypagaḷa voppa haṁdā
ḍiya Ūravara voppa Āṁṇauṁgurapaḷiya voppa yīśvarauṁgurapaḷiya vo
ppa viṣṇuvoraṁbaḷiya voppa madhasrahoḷana voppa rāmakruṣṇa dēvagaḷa baraha . dānapā
lanayōrmadhyē dānātsrēyōnu pālanaṁ . dānāsvargga mavāpnōti pālanādacutaṁ padaṁ .
sadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harē kiṁ vasuṁdharā . śaṣṭirvaruṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāya
tē krimi . śubhamastu . maṁgaḷa mahā śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 27.156 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
